subject: Student Accessibility Services For Incoming Students
content:
Welcome to all new students joining us next term!

Accessibility services can help set you up for success. Get to know your accommodation and technology options as well as other services we provide.

We have our annual Accessibility Info Day webinar coming up. We’d love if you joined us. The event is online, next Monday at 7 p.m., see you then!

Regards,

Jennifer Wilks
Student Accessibility Services Advisor
jwilks@PSU.ca
Administration Block 555, Unit 1
